Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Input Data Lets list the events chronologically with their key attributes 085950 FOCUS Word Quarterly_Reportdocx 090000 FOCUS Word Document1docx 090030 TYPING Word Document1docx Draft intro 090100 TYPING Word Document1docx Additional details 090115 SAVE Word Document1docx and so on listing all events

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: What constitutes a case in process mining for desktop activity logs Option 1 Per application session Too fragmented Option 2 Per documentfile Makes sense Document1docx Email Report_Draftpdf Budget_2024xlsx Quarterly_Reportdocx Option 3 Per logical work sessiontask generalizing from sequences

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Group by the primary artifactdocument being worked on Case 1 Drafting Document1docx Case 2 Handling Email about Annual Meeting Case 3 Reviewing Report_Draftpdf Case 4 Updating Budget_2024xlsx Case 5 Working on Quarterly_Reportdocx

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The sequence shows multitasking workflow 0900090115 Work on Document1 090145090320 Work on Email 090400090445 Review PDF 090500090545 Update Budget 090600090630 Back to Document1 090630090815 Work on Quarterly_Report inferring artifact based cases as best explanation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Event Mapping Activity Standardization Raw FOCUS TYPING SAVE SWITCH CLICK SCROLL HIGHLIGHT CLOSE to standardized Open Document Edit Content Save Document Switch Application Open Message Review Message Compose Reply Draft Reply Send Message Review Document Highlight Information Update Data Close Document mapping each event 1 to 26 to cases

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Verify the case grouping logic Is it better to group by task rather than file The prompt says such as editing a specific document handling a particular email reviewing a certain PDF So file based is appropriate checking row count timestamps SWITCH assignment to target case

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Missed the very first event 085950 FOCUS Quarterly_Report adjust to CASE_05_QReport as Open Document refining Activity Names multiple times Activate Document Edit Content Save File Review Content etc self correction refinement during thought adjusting for consistency

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: For process mining standardize activities verb noun pairs consistent across apps use Activate File Edit Content Save File Switch Context Open Item Review Content Send Message Highlight Text Update Data Close File balancing standardization with domain specificity using best practices
